data.title: As an engineering team lead, I want T1 and T2 kudos triggers for pre-existing bug fixes and previously-failing test remediation backed by snapshot evidence
data.description:
As an engineering team lead, I need T1 (pre-existing bug fix with test evidence) and T2 (previously-failing test fixed) kudos triggers so that agents earn recognition for deliberate quality improvements backed by snapshot evidence.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- T1 and T2 integrated as functions in commit-validate.sh (same integration point as Epic 1 T-series triggers — no new hook or lifecycle script needed)
- T1 conditions (all must pass): (a) commit message matches "(Closes|Fixes|Refs)\s+[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}" (b) dso ticket show <id> type=bug AND first-event timestamp predates snapshot.merge_base (c) git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD Python source files (exclude test_*.py) + .test-index reverse lookup + test in snapshot as failed|timeout or aggregate_status=failed|timeout (d) current commit transitions test to passed
- T1 source file identification: parse git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD for Python source files; for each, .test-index reverse lookup; check snapshot
- T1 diagnostic: when 3 of 4 conditions met, emit WARNING identifying which condition failed
- T1 fail-open: dso ticket show failure → skip with warning; snapshot absent → skip with warning
- T2 conditions: snapshot aggregate_status = failed|timeout (resource_exhaustion excluded); commit transitions test run to passed; snapshot tests map empty → no-op (documented)
- Kudos emission: calls emit_kudos from Epic 1 Story A ledger infrastructure with trigger_id T1|T2
- Unit tests cover: each T1 condition independently; T2 pass, T2 skip (empty snapshot), T2 no-op (resource_exhaustion)

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Blocker] Depends on Epic 1 Story A (b41b-0369) for emit_kudos function
- [Blocker] Depends on Story J for snapshot infrastructure
- [Data model] T1/T2 snapshot schema uses S2 spike decision; if aggregate-only, T2 detects full test suite transition
